hero.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
hero.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

aries.general: Today is filled with opportunities and potential for growth. Make the most of it!
aries.love: A meaningful conversation can deepen your relationship. Seek understanding.
aries.career: Work hard and keep your goals in sight; success is on the horizon.

taurus.general: Patience will pay off today. Take your time and trust your instincts.
taurus.love: Open your heart; vulnerability will bring you closer to your partner.
taurus.career: Collaboration with a colleague could lead to significant breakthroughs.

gemini.general: Embrace change today; it's a chance to reinvent yourself.
gemini.love: New connections are on the way; keep an open mind!
gemini.career: Communication is key today. Be clear in your discussions.

cancer.general: Emotional clarity will help you navigate any challenges today.
cancer.love: Nurturing your relationships will lead to fulfillment today.
cancer.career: Trust your intuition when making important decisions.

leo.general: Your charisma shines bright today, attracting others to your goals.
leo.love: Romantic gestures will be well received; don’t hold back.
leo.career: Leadership opportunities may arise. Step forward confidently.

virgo.general: Attention to detail will lead you to success today; don’t overlook the small things.
virgo.love: Strengthening communication with your partner enriches your bond.
virgo.career: Your analytical skills will be valued in team projects.

libra.general: Balance is crucial today. Make time for both work and play.
libra.love: A romantic outing may reignite passion in your relationship.
libra.career: Diplomacy in the workplace will help smooth over conflicts.

scorpio.general: Embrace your mysterious side today; it will intrigue those around you.
scorpio.love: Deep conversations can transform your relationship into something more meaningful.
scorpio.career: Your determination will lead you to breakthrough results.

sagittarius.general: Adventure is calling you; seek out new experiences today.
sagittarius.love: Spontaneity will spice up your love life.
sagittarius.career: Expect unexpected opportunities to appear. Be ready to explore.

capricorn.general: Hard work will pay off but don't forget to celebrate small victories.
capricorn.love: Show appreciation to your partner; it's essential for relationship growth.
capricorn.career: Recognition for your efforts is likely today; enjoy it!

aquarius.general: Innovation and creativity will drive your success today.
aquarius.love: Connect with friends or loved ones to spark joy.
aquarius.career: Your unique ideas will stand out in discussions. Share them!

pisces.general: Dreams and reality may blur today; trust your instincts.
pisces.love: A romantic surprise could be on the horizon. Stay open!
pisces.career: Follow your passion; it may lead to professional satisfaction.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen, you create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: I find that the harder I work, the more luck I seem to have.
professional.author: Thomas Jefferson

professional.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
professional.author: Albert Schweitzer

professional.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
professional.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: Success is not in what you have, but who you are.
motivation.author: Bo Bennett

motivation.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
motivation.author: C.S. Lewis

motivation.text: Push yourself, because no one else is going to do it for you.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Great things never come from comfort zones.
motivation.author: Unknown

captions.text: Make today so awesome that yesterday gets jealous.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Hustle until your haters ask if you’re hiring.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Dream big, work hard, stay focused.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: You didn’t come this far to only come this far.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Make your life a masterpiece; imagine no limitations on what you can be, have or do.
captions.author: Brian Tracy

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: The future is already here – it's just not very evenly distributed.
tech.author: William Gibson

tech.text: Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.
tech.author: Arthur C. Clarke

tech.text: It has become appallingly obvious that our technology has exceeded our humanity.
tech.author: Albert Einstein

fun.text: Why don’t scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I told my computer I needed a break, and now it won't stop sending me beach pictures!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Parallel lines have so much in common. It’s a shame they’ll never meet.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I would avoid the sushi if I were you. It’s a little fishy.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Why was the math book sad? Because it had too many problems.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Do you want to hear a pizza joke? Never mind; it’s too cheesy.
fun.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don’t see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: To one who has faith, no explanation is necessary. To one without faith, no explanation is possible.
faith.author: Thomas Aquinas

faith.text: Faith does not make things easy, it makes them possible.
faith.author: Luke 1:37

faith.text: Everything is possible for one who believes.
faith.author: Mark 9:23

faith.text: Faith is the substance of things hoped for, the evidence of things not seen.
faith.author: Hebrews 11:1

faith.text: Keep your faith a little higher than your fear.
faith.author: Unknown

wisdom.text: The journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.
wisdom.author: Lao Tzu

wisdom.text: In the end, we will remember not the words of our enemies, but the silence of our friends.
wisdom.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Wise men speak because they have something to say; fools because they have to say something.
wisdom.author: Plato

wisdom.text: Do not go where the path may lead, go instead where there is no path and leave a trail.
wisdom.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson
